title: Sweet Pepper Delight
description: A silky and sweet Algerian brunch dish featuring roasted bell peppers deglazed with aromatic herbs for a jain-friendly, vegan option.

ingredients.name: 4 ripe but firm red or orange bell peppers
ingredients.notes: Choose peppers that are slightly soft and not overly shriveled.

ingredients.name: 1 large onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet variety if available.

ingredients.name: 2 sprigs fresh parsley, finely chopped (for garnish)
1/4 cup tamari sauce or soy sauce

instructions: Chop the bell peppers into strips and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped onion and garlic, sauté until translucent and fragrant for about 5 minutes.
Add bell pepper strips to the pan, reduce heat to medium, and cook for another 10-15 minutes until peppers are softened and slightly charred on some parts (this caramelization is key).
Deglaze the pan with lemon juice and tamari sauce. Stir well to incorporate all the ingredients into a smooth sauce.
Let the mixture cool slightly, then blend using an immersion blender or by transferring it to a regular blender until you reach your desired consistency.
Serve the Sweet Pepper Delight warm as a side dish or dip, garnished with chopped parsley for added flavor and color.
